title: Bus Drivers, Transit and Intercity
description: Drive bus or motor coach, including regular route operations, charters, and private carriage. May assist passengers with baggage. May collect fares or tickets.

tasks.text: Drive vehicles over specified routes or to specified destinations according to time schedules, complying with traffic regulations to ensure that passengers have a smooth and safe ride.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Park vehicles at loading areas so that passengers can board.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect vehicles and check gas, oil, and water levels prior to departure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist passengers, such as elderly or individuals with disabilities, on and off bus, ensure they are seated properly, help carry baggage, and answer questions about bus schedules or routes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect tickets or cash fares from passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise passengers to be seated and orderly while on vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Regulate heating, lighting, and ventilating systems for passenger comfort.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record information, such as cash receipts and ticket fares, and maintain log book.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain cleanliness of bus or motor coach.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read maps to plan bus routes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Load and unload baggage in baggage compartments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
